What are the Common Web Security Vulnerabilities?

Web application vulnerabilities in simpler words mean when a system flaw or weakness in a web-based application is involved. You wouldn’t believe it, these vulnerabilities have been around for years and there is nothing we could have ever done to completely stop them. These vulnerabilities usually happen due to not validating or sanitizing form inputs.… Read More »
